home.headline: Settle group bills with ease
home.sub: Add expenses anytime, let everyone contribute, and settle in one click.

errors.username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.username_too_long: Username must be at most 32 characters
errors.username_invalid_chars: Username may only contain letters, digits, underscore, dot, hyphen
errors.username_not_allowed: This username is not currently allowed to register
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passkey_enroll_failed: Passkey enrollment failed. Redirected to account page — you can retry or set a password instead.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts — please try again later
errors.invalid_currency: Use a 3-letter currency code (e.g. USD, CNY)
errors.invalid_link: This link is invalid or has been revoked
errors.expense_locked: This expense is part of a closed settlement and cannot be edited
errors.unknown_payer: Selected payer is not in this group
errors.fx_unavailable: Couldn't fetch the exchange rate — enter it manually
errors.ai_failed: AI assist failed. Please fill in manually.
errors.ai_timeout: AI assist timed out. Please try again.
errors.ai_not_configured: AI assist is not configured on this server.
errors.ai_image_unsupported: The current AI model does not support image context.
errors.not_draft: This expense is not a draft
errors.same_member: Payer and recipient cannot be the same person
errors.member_already_claimed: This member is already linked to another account
errors.member_name_taken: Member name already exists in this group
errors.member_already_linked: This member is already linked to an account
errors.user_already_linked_in_group: This account is already linked to another member in this group
errors.target_not_linked: Target user must be a linked member in this group

admin.title: Super Admin
admin.account_desc: Manage the usernames allowed to register. When both the database and environment lists are empty, registration is disabled; once either has usernames, only listed usernames can register.
admin.username_desc: Add or remove usernames allowed to register. Usernames are stored in lowercase; entries from INITIAL_ALLOWED_USERNAMES must be removed from the environment variable.
admin.username_empty: No usernames are currently allowed to register, so new registrations are disabled.

passkey.section_desc: Passkeys let you sign in without a password using Face ID / Touch ID / Windows Hello and similar.
passkey.not_supported: Your browser does not support passkeys

account.title: Account settings
account.profile_desc: Manage your display name and profile information.
account.security_desc: Manage passkeys and password sign-in methods in one place (add or remove).
account.credential_name_hint: Leave empty to use the suggestion: {suggestion}
account.password_setup_desc: Set a password as a backup authentication method.
account.delete_desc: Permanently delete your account, all owned groups, and their contents.
account.delete_warning: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted.
account.delete_owned_warning: You own {count} group(s). These will be deleted along with your account:
account.delete_no_owned: You don't own any groups. Deleting your account will only remove your access (groups owned by others are unaffected).
account.delete_transfer_hint: You can transfer OWNER rights to other linked members before deleting your account.

groups.empty: You haven't created any groups yet. Create one to start tracking expenses.
groups.name: Name
groups.initial_members: Initial members (optional, one per line or comma-separated)
groups.confirm_delete: This cannot be undone. Delete the entire group?
groups.archived_banner: This group is archived; all expenses are read-only. The OWNER can reopen the settlement to keep editing.
groups.transfer_no_candidates: No eligible recipients (must be a linked member)
groups.transfer_owner_desc: Select a linked member to become the new OWNER. You will be downgraded to MANAGER.
groups.delete_desc: Permanently delete this group and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

members.title: Members
members.confirm_remove: Remove this member? Members with expense records cannot be removed.
members.confirm_unlink: Unlink this member from their account? The user will lose the ability to act as this member; the member and their expense records are unaffected.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.empty: No expenses yet. Record your first one to get started.
expenses.draft_mode_hint: Skip the amount and split for now — the payer can fill them in from the group page.
expenses.ai_placeholder: e.g. Lunch with Alice and Bob yesterday, 87.50 USD, I paid
expenses.ai_hint: AI will pre-fill the form. Review before saving.
expenses.ai_use_image_confirm: Use this image as AI context to pre-fill the form?
expenses.ai_image_too_large: Image is too large for AI context (max 3MB)
expenses.ai_receipt_dialog_desc: AI can read this receipt and pre-fill the form. You can review everything before saving.
expenses.ai_receipt_prompt_text: Please read the uploaded receipt image and pre-fill the expense form.
expenses.drafts_to_fill: {count, plural, one {# draft to fill} other {# drafts to fill}}
expenses.drafts_hint: Type the amount paid for each item. Saving converts the draft into a regular expense, split equally among all members.
expenses.draft_filled_count: {count, plural, one {# draft saved} other {# drafts saved}}
expenses.reopen_desc: This group has been settled. Click to reopen and continue editing expenses.

settlements.settle_confirm_desc: This will lock {count} expenses and archive the group. The OWNER can reopen it from the group page to keep editing.
settlements.settle_draft_warning: {count, plural, one {# draft expense will be deleted.} other {# draft expenses will be deleted.}}
settlements.reopen_confirm: Reopening will make the group editable again and delete this settlement record. Continue?
settlements.confirm_delete_entry: Delete this transfer record? The amount will no longer be deducted from balances.

share.title: Share links
share.dialog_desc: Generate share links for this member. Visitors using a link act as them in this group.
share.expired_read_only_notice: This link has expired. You can view the group, but not make any changes.
share.confirm_revoke: Revoke this link? Already-shared URLs will stop working immediately.
share.claim_prompt: Are you {name}? Confirming will link this account to that member.
share.member_already_linked: This member is already linked to an account. New share links are disabled.
share.link_one_time_warning: This link is shown only once — copy it now, you won't see it again.
